content:
I was unable to analyze the YouTube video because I could not connect to Google Chrome. 

Please inform the user that the connection to Chrome could not be established. Ask them to ensure that Chrome is running with remote debugging enabled by navigating to `chrome://inspect/#remote-debugging` and checking the appropriate settings. Once that is done, they can retry their request.

toolCall.name: send_message
toolCall.argumentsJson: {"Message":"I was unable to analyze the YouTube video because I could not connect to Google Chrome. \n\nPlease inform the user that the connection to Chrome could not be established. Ask them to ensure that Chrome is running with remote debugging enabled by navigating to `chrome://inspect/#remote-debugging` and checking the appropriate settings. Once that is done, they can retry their request.","Recipient":"496cc9f1-9b87-49ad-a115-66ed7e4ad4fc","toolAction":"Notifying main agent about Chrome connection failure","toolSummary":"Notify connection failure"}
